action:
import pyautogui
import time

# Click on the departure airport code (EWR) to change it
pyautogui.click(x=350, y=280)  # Coordinates may need adjustment
time.sleep(1)

# Type 'JFK' for New York–Kennedy Airport
pyautogui.typewrite('JFK', interval=0.2)
time.sleep(0.5)

# Press Enter to confirm the selection
pyautogui.press('enter')
time.sleep(1)

import pyautogui
import time

# Click on the departure airport code (EWR) to change it
pyautogui.click(x=210, y=280)  # Coordinates may need adjustment
time.sleep(1)

# Type 'JFK' for New York–Kennedy Airport
pyautogui.typewrite('JFK', interval=0.2)
time.sleep(0.5)

# Press Enter to confirm the selection
pyautogui.press('enter')
time.sleep(1)

import pyautogui
import time

# Click "I understand" to close the pop-up
pyautogui.click(x=600, y=580)  # Coordinates may need adjustment
time.sleep(1)
response:
